project_info.name: Flick - Gen Z Social Video Chat
project_info.archetype: Pastel & Soft mixed with Neo-Brutalism (Gen Z Vibe)

design_principles: Neo-Brutalist Contrast: Soft pastel backgrounds contrasted with hard 3px-4px black borders and solid drop shadows.
Safety First: AI moderation features and safety cues are prominent, high-contrast, and never hidden in menus.
Bold Typography: Huge, tight-tracked headings. Personality over neutrality.
Tactile Interactions: Buttons and cards physically depress when pressed (shadow shrinks, element moves down).

splash_onboarding.layout: Full screen vibrant pastel background (#B1B2FF). Big bold typography in center. Neo-brutalist buttons at the bottom. Use absolute positioning for abstract shapes in corners.

login_register.layout: Standard form but with neo-brutalist inputs. Label text must be bold and uppercase.

home_swipe.layout: Tinder-style deck. Cards use the 'polaroid' style with a 3px border and thick shadow. Actions (Undo, Pass, Super Like, Like) are large circular buttons overlapping the bottom of the card.
home_swipe.special_rules: Super Like triggers a full-screen #FFDE59 flash.

match_screen.layout: Modal overlay. Bright #FF90E8 background. 'IT\'S A VIBE' in giant 40px text. Two circular avatars overlapping with thick borders.

video_lobby.layout: Camera preview is full screen, but framed inside a 3px border container with rounded corners and 16px margins. Filter chips at the top.

in_call.layout: Remote video is full screen. Local video is a draggable mini window with 3px border. AI Moderation Banner floats at the top: bright red with white text if flagged, else hidden. Subtitles (live translation) in a black semi-transparent box at the bottom.
features: Mute/Next/End floating action buttons (glassmorphism but with a solid 1px border)

chat_list.layout: List items with 3px bottom border separators. Unread messages have a bright pink dot. Avatars are squares with rounded corners (borderRadius 12) and 2px borders.

profile.layout: Scrollable view. Large header avatar. Trust Score badge prominent at the top right. Grid for interests (pill shaped, 2px borders, various pastel backgrounds).

discover.layout: Sticky horizontal scroll for filter chips at the top. Grid of 2 columns for user cards (polaroid style).
discover.features: Filter chips do not wrap, horizontal ScrollView with hidden scrollbar.

subscription.layout: Carousel of 3 massive cards. Premium Plus card is larger, scaled to 1.05, and has a yellow #FFDE59 background. Highlight features with big checkmark icons.

wallet_store.layout: Grid of coin packages. Each package is a card. Big coin icon. Neo-brutalist styling makes it look like physical arcade tokens.

referral.layout: Centered illustration of friends, massive referral code text with a 'Copy' button.

admin_lite.layout: Data-heavy but styled like a Gen-Z dashboard. High contrast, mono fonts for numbers, strict grid layout.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use testID (React Native) mapped logically, e.g., testID='login-submit-button', testID='swipe-right-button'.

onboarding.description: Friends taking a selfie, high energy, used for onboarding hero
Diverse group of friends enjoying a selfie, used for referral page hero

profiles.description: Young man smiling warmly, profile placeholder 2
Man smiling during daytime, profile placeholder 3

backgrounds.description: Artistic abstract fluid background for premium upsell screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Use StyleSheet in React Native to implement these specific neo-brutalist border and shadow rules. Do not rely on default shadow props (elevation on Android will look wrong; use solid views positioned behind elements to fake the hard shadow on Android).
For Typography, load 'Clash Display' and 'Manrope' via expo-font. If not immediately available, fall back to System font with bold weights.
Ensure the AI Moderation banner in the in-call screen has high z-index and uses the #FF5757 danger color for immediate visibility.
Implement the swipe deck using a library like react-native-deck-swiper or reanimated, but apply the 'card.polaroid' styles to the container.

For interactive buttons, wrap with Pressable and use useAnimatedStyle to translate the button down (e.g., transform: [{translateY: 4}]) and reduce shadow offset to 0 when pressed, simulating a physical button press.
All testID attributes MUST be applied to interactive components.
